per_camera.front_left: Quiet suburban residential street with parked cars on the left (white pickup), trees, and houses on the right behind fences; the scene shifts slightly forward across frames suggesting slow forward motion or a gentle turn.
per_camera.front_right: Views of the same residential street with a parked dark SUV/pickup ahead and a grey sedan parked at a driveway on the right; no moving traffic or pedestrians visible.
per_camera.right: Close views of residential fences, hedges, a tiled sidewalk, and a gated house frontage; the last frame shows a blurred hedge suggesting the camera is passing close to vegetation.
per_camera.rear: Tree-lined street receding behind the vehicle with parked cars on both sides and a large pickup truck visible; a bicycle handlebar is consistently in the lower frame, indicating a cyclist directly behind the ego vehicle.
per_camera.left: Parked cars along the curb (SUV, sedans, white hatchback) with trees and houses; routine stationary scene with no active road users.

summary.overall: Slow transit through a quiet tree-lined residential street with a cyclist trailing behind.
summary.reason: A cyclist is persistently close behind the ego vehicle (visible in rear camera across all frames), which is a vulnerable road user worth confirming for following distance and ego speed behavior.

moments.label: Oncoming white SUV passing at close range

evidence.snippet: White Ford EcoSport approaching head-on in the same narrow lane, growing rapidly across frames img#8-9, centered just left of ego path
Same white SUV visible front-center-left, very close, with dark pickup behind it also occupying the lane
White EcoSport now abeam on left side, close lateral clearance as it passes ego

moments.why_review: Narrow residential street with parked vehicles on both sides; oncoming vehicle passes at close lateral margin. Worth reviewing clearance and any evasive steering.
moments.inferred_ego_motion: Slow forward, possible slight slowdown for passing vehicle

moments.label: Roundabout/traffic island negotiation

evidence.snippet: Circular planted island with trees directly ahead; road splits around it, ego steering to navigate
Same island visible, horizon rotates between img#15 and img#16 indicating yaw
Scene sweeps laterally as ego curves around island
Rear view shows street curving away, consistent with turning maneuver

moments.why_review: Unsigned/uncontrolled roundabout negotiation in a residential area — verify path planning and yielding behavior.

deep.rationale: Window shows low-speed residential driving on a tree-lined street with parked cars on both sides, one oncoming-vehicle close pass, and negotiation of a small planted traffic island/roundabout. No sudden braking, swerve artifacts, sensor occlusion, pedestrians, animals, or cross-camera inconsistencies were observed. Ego motion is steady forward with a gentle yaw at the roundabout.

per_camera.front_left: Quiet residential street lined with palms, high walls, and trees; pedestrians/joggers appear on the right sidewalk in the mid-window frames, then the scene opens to a wider suburban intersection with parked cars.
per_camera.front_right: Same forward view showing a tree-lined street with pedestrians visible on the right sidewalk; later frames transition to a more open intersection with houses and parked vehicles, no immediate hazards in path.
per_camera.right: Side view of a long brick boundary wall with sidewalk, later transitioning to a street-name signpost ('José...') at a corner; motion blur on wall texture suggests steady forward travel.
per_camera.rear: Rear view shows the road receding with a roundabout featuring a red truck parked to the side, then a downhill street with a 30 km/h speed limit sign, then a jogger and a person walking a dog on the right.
per_camera.left: Left side shows shaded stone/ivy-covered walls and hedges along the sidewalk, ending with a view across a side-street intersection with houses and large trees — consistent with passing a cross street.

summary.overall: Routine low-speed drive through a quiet tree-lined residential area with pedestrians on sidewalks and an approaching intersection.
summary.reason: No close-margin encounters, no erratic ego motion indicators, clear weather, and pedestrians remain on sidewalks well clear of the vehicle path.

per_camera.front_left: Residential tree-lined street with parked cars on the right and a dark SUV ahead; ego appears to approach and then reach an intersection with utility poles and cones visible in the later frames.
per_camera.front_right: Mirrors the front_left view showing the same quiet street, parked vehicles, and an intersection ahead with what looks like orange cones and signage near a pole cluster.
per_camera.right: Side view of sidewalk, grass strips, trees, and residential buildings; a parked white car and later a portable blue toilet/container appear, indicating passage along the block.
per_camera.rear: Rear view shows the street behind with oncoming/following cars including a dark SUV and a small hatchback, plus a cyclist's handlebar visible in frame suggesting a bike-mounted or trailing cyclist close behind.
per_camera.left: Left side shows grass verges, trees, shadows on pavement, and in the final frame a black sedan very close alongside with a visible driver, indicating a passing or adjacent vehicle at close lateral range.

summary.overall: Low-speed drive along a quiet residential street ending near an intersection, with a close-passing black sedan on the left at the end.
summary.reason: The final left-camera frame shows a black sedan at very close lateral proximity with motion blur, and a cyclist appears consistently behind in the rear view — both warrant closer review for margin and interaction safety.

moments.label: Oncoming vehicle close pass on narrow tree-lined street

evidence.snippet: White hatchback approaches in oncoming lane on narrow two-way residential street with parked cars constricting lane width
Same white Ford Fiesta visible head-on in left portion of frame, gold hatchback parked on right further narrowing passable space
Gold parked hatchback on right curb very close to ego path

moments.why_review: Tight lateral clearance between oncoming car and parked vehicles; verify planner behavior in constricted two-way corridor

moments.label: Pedestrian near traffic cones at gated checkpoint / level crossing

evidence.snippet: Person standing beside small booth with orange traffic cones at intersection; railroad crossing signal pole visible ahead
Railroad crossing with signal, barriers and cones visible ahead-right
Close view of person standing next to booth with cones on left side

moments.why_review: Pedestrian stands at edge of roadway near cones and rail crossing infrastructure — unusual static actor and rail-grade crossing warrant perception/planning review
moments.inferred_ego_motion: slowing to near-stop approaching rail crossing

moments.label: Lens flare / sun glare artifact in forward view

evidence.snippet: Orange/purple lens-flare blob visible in upper-center of frame against bright sky
Similar flare artifact and washed-out bright region in the same area

moments.why_review: Sun glare / lens flare may degrade forward perception in this segment; verify detection robustness

moments.label: Possible near-stall / very low forward progress

evidence.snippet: Parked Jeep on right at mid-frame distance
Same Jeep scene nearly identical composition ~1s later, minimal scene compression

moments.why_review: Consecutive front frames show minimal change in scale/position of the parked Jeep, suggesting very low speed or brief stop — check for unexplained hesitation

deep.rationale: Visual-only review of 20s window shows residential low-speed cruising on tree-lined streets. Notable items: a tight two-way passing scene with an oncoming hatchback between parked cars, approach to a level/rail crossing with a pedestrian and traffic cones, visible sun/lens flare in forward cameras, and a brief apparent near-stall inferred from minimal scene change between consecutive front frames. No hard brake, swerve, or cross-camera object dropout was observed.
